inputs.label: Cathode Standard Reduction Potential (E°_cathode)
inputs.businessContext: Standard reduction potential of the cathode half-reaction, e.g., Cu²⁺ + 2e⁻ → Cu is 0.34 V.

label_i18n.fr: Potentiel standard de réduction de la cathode (E°_cathode)
label_i18n.es: Potencial estándar de reducción del cátodo (E°_cátodo)

businessContext_i18n.en: Standard reduction potential of the cathode half-reaction, e.g., Cu²⁺ + 2e⁻ → Cu is 0.34 V.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Katot yarı reaksiyonunun standart indirgenme potansiyeli, örn. Cu²⁺ + 2e⁻ → Cu için 0,34 V.
businessContext_i18n.de: Standard-Reduktionspotential der Kathoden-Halbreaktion, z. B. Cu²⁺ + 2e⁻ → Cu ist 0,34 V.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Potentiel standard de réduction de la demi-réaction cathodique, ex. : Cu²⁺ + 2e⁻ → Cu est 0,34 V.
businessContext_i18n.es: Potencial estándar de reducción de la semirreacción del cátodo, ej., Cu²⁺ + 2e⁻ → Cu es 0.34 V.
businessContext_i18n.ar: جهد الاختزال القياسي لنصف تفاعل الكاثود، مثل Cu²⁺ + 2e⁻ → Cu هو 0.34 فولت

inputs.label: Anode Standard Reduction Potential (E°_anode)
inputs.businessContext: Standard reduction potential of the anode half-reaction, e.g., Zn²⁺ + 2e⁻ → Zn is -0.76 V.

label_i18n.fr: Potentiel standard de réduction de l'anode (E°_anode)
label_i18n.es: Potencial estándar de reducción del ánodo (E°_ánodo)

businessContext_i18n.en: Standard reduction potential of the anode half-reaction, e.g., Zn²⁺ + 2e⁻ → Zn is -0.76 V.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Anot yarı reaksiyonunun standart indirgenme potansiyeli, örn. Zn²⁺ + 2e⁻ → Zn için -0,76 V.
businessContext_i18n.de: Standard-Reduktionspotential der Anoden-Halbreaktion, z. B. Zn²⁺ + 2e⁻ → Zn ist -0,76 V.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Potentiel standard de réduction de la demi-réaction anodique, ex. : Zn²⁺ + 2e⁻ → Zn est -0,76 V.
businessContext_i18n.es: Potencial estándar de reducción de la semirreacción del ánodo, ej., Zn²⁺ + 2e⁻ → Zn es -0.76 V.
businessContext_i18n.ar: جهد الاختزال القياسي لنصف تفاعل الأنود، مثل Zn²⁺ + 2e⁻ → Zn هو -0.76 فولت

inputs.label: Temperature (T)
inputs.businessContext: Temperature in Kelvin. Standard conditions are 298.15 K (25°C).

businessContext_i18n.en: Temperature in Kelvin. Standard conditions are 298.15 K (25°C).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Kelvin cinsinden sıcaklık. Standart koşullar 298,15 K (25°C).
businessContext_i18n.de: Temperatur in Kelvin. Standardbedingungen sind 298,15 K (25 °C).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Température en Kelvin. Les conditions standard sont 298,15 K (25°C).
businessContext_i18n.es: Temperatura en Kelvin. Las condiciones estándar son 298.15 K (25°C).
businessContext_i18n.ar: درجة الحرارة بالكلفن. الظروف القياسية هي 298.15 كلفن (25°م)

inputs.label: Number of Electrons Transferred (n)
inputs.businessContext: Number of moles of electrons transferred according to the balanced redox reaction.

businessContext_i18n.en: Number of moles of electrons transferred according to the balanced redox reaction.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Dengeli redoks reaksiyonuna göre transfer edilen elektron mol sayısı.
businessContext_i18n.de: Anzahl der Mol Elektronen, die gemäß der ausgeglichenen Redoxreaktion übertragen werden.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Nombre de moles d'électrons transférés selon la réaction redox équilibrée.
businessContext_i18n.es: Número de moles de electrones transferidos según la reacción redox balanceada.
businessContext_i18n.ar: عدد مولات الإلكترونات المنقولة وفقًا لتفاعل الأكسدة والاختزال المتوازن

inputs.label: Reaction Quotient (Q)
inputs.businessContext: Ratio of product activities to reactant activities at given concentrations/pressures. For aA + bB → cC + dD, Q = [C]^c[D]^d / [A]^a[B]^b.

businessContext_i18n.en: Ratio of product activities to reactant activities at given concentrations/pressures. For aA + bB → cC + dD, Q = [C]^c[D]^d / [A]^a[B]^b.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Belirli derişim/basınçlarda ürün aktivitelerinin reaktan aktivitelerine oranı. aA + bB → cC + dD için Q = [C]^c[D]^d / [A]^a[B]^b.
businessContext_i18n.de: Verhältnis der Produktaktivitäten zu den Reaktantenaktivitäten bei gegebenen Konzentrationen/Drücken. Für aA + bB → cC + dD gilt Q = [C]^c[D]^d / [A]^a[B]^b.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Rapport des activités des produits sur les activités des réactifs aux concentrations/pressions données. Pour aA + bB → cC + dD, Q = [C]^c[D]^d / [A]^a[B]^b.
businessContext_i18n.es: Relación de actividades de productos a reactivos a concentraciones/presiones dadas. Para aA + bB → cC + dD, Q = [C]^c[D]^d / [A]^a[B]^b.
businessContext_i18n.ar: نسبة أنشطة النواتج إلى أنشطة المتفاعلات عند تراكيز/ضغوط معينة. للتفاعل aA + bB → cC + dD، Q = [C]^c[D]^d / [A]^a[B]^b

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.

rules.message: Temperature must be greater than 0 K.
Number of electrons must be positive.
